sub_modules.fir_symmetric_preadd: Combinational symmetric tap pre-adder that pairs mirrored delay-line samples and forwards the center sample.
sub_modules.fir_symmetric_mac: Combinational multiply-accumulate engine using the exact 101-tap symmetric coefficient set and 64-bit accumulation.
sub_modules.fir_output_scale: Combinational fixed-point output scaler that arithmetic right-shifts the 64-bit accumulator by 20 bits.
